title: Heyy Baby
desc: Three men living in Australia are surprised to find a baby on their doorstep. They do not know who the father is and start a frantic search for the woman who could possibly be the mother.

title: Rekhachithram
desc: Suspended officer Vivek Gopinath returns after a gambling scandal to pursue a 40-year murder case with a faceless victim, seeking redemption by finally solving the mystery.

title: Har Din Diwali
desc: Sai, a caring grandson, dedicates himself to making Raghu Ramayya's last days memorable when the elderly man's busy children fail to find time for him.

title: Pati Patni Aur Who
desc: Chintu Tyagi is an ordinary, middle class man who finds himself torn between his wife and another woman

title: Drunken Master
desc: Wong, a playful boy, learns martial arts from a drunk master. He trains hard to stop a deadly assassin and protect those he cares about.

title: Judwa No.1
desc: Twin brothers separated at birth grow up differently. When one is kidnapped, fate brings them together, revealing secrets and testing the strength of their newfound bond.

title: Ek Tsunami Jwalamukhi
desc: This explosive drama blends metaphor and disaster imagery to explore emotional upheaval and human resilience, capturing the intensity of life-altering choices and consequences.

title: Antim Faisla
desc: Raju a cable operator, Saroja a prostitute, Ramulu a weaver, Vivek a rock star, Raheemuddin. The stories of these five are interwoven into one.

title: Marriage Bureau
desc: A money-minded marriage broker, Malligadu runs a bureau, arranging marriages with a one-year relationship guarantee, challenging love, ethics, and trust as couples' fates intertwine.

title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.
